display.purpose: Hero H1 only — Oswald 600 uppercase, white on Sanitary Blue.

label.purpose: IBM Plex Mono uppercase micro-labels: kickers, buttons, form labels.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards on hover only, paired with translateY(-4px). No resting shadows anywhere.

motion.name: key-turn
motion.purpose: Logomark key rotation on logo hover; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button (Green)
components.description: The conversion button — catalog and KP requests.
components.css: .ds-btn-green { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; background: #2f9e5c; color: #fff; transition: transform 0.15s ease, background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-green:hover { background: #23824a; } .ds-btn-green:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-green:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #14406e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Button (Blue)
components.description: Header CTA and secondary emphasis on light surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-blue { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; background: #14406e; color: #fff; transition: transform 0.15s ease, background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-blue:hover { background: #1b5391; } .ds-btn-blue:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-blue:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f9e5c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Kicker
components.description: The one kicker system: mono uppercase label with a 22px green dash prefix, one per section head.
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #2f9e5c; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-kicker::before { content: ''; width: 22px; height: 2px; background: #2f9e5c; }

components.name: Zone Legend Row
components.description: HACCP zone legend entry: color dot + bold zone name + role, on dark blue surfaces.
components.html:
Красный — зоны высокого риска
Синий — общие помещения
components.css: .ds-zone-demo { background: #14406e; padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 3px; } .ds-zone-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 13px; padding: 9px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.16); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); } .ds-zone-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-zone-row b { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; } .ds-dot { width: 13px; height: 13px; border-radius: 50%; flex: none; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Flat white card with hairline border and a 4px category-color top border.
components.html:
Аудит предприятия

Выезжаем на объект и оцениваем соответствие инвентаря требованиям ХАССП.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d7e0ea; border-top: 4px solid #2f9e5c; border-radius: 3px; padding: 36px 32px; max-width: 360px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #14406e; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-text { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: #55687c; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Hairline-bordered input with mono uppercase label; focus switches the border to Action Green.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: #55687c; margin-bottom: 6px; display: block; } .ds-input { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d7e0ea; border-radius: 3px; padding: 12px 14px; color: #16293c; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9fb0c0; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2f9e5c; }

components.name: Zone Bar
components.description: The 6px five-segment HACCP strip that tops the hero — the zone map in miniature.
components.css: .ds-zonebar { display: flex; height: 6px; width: 100%; min-width: 240px; } .ds-zonebar span { flex: 1; }

narrative.overview: The entire system is organized like a facility zone map: everything is coded, legible, and in its place. Five HACCP zone colors act as the brand's native vocabulary — wayfinding wherever zone meaning is real, and nowhere else. Around that coded core sits an engineered, procedural frame: condensed uppercase Oswald headings, IBM Plex Mono labels that read like equipment markings, sharp 3px corners, and hairline borders. The whole page should feel the way a facility feels after a passed audit — ordered, inspection-ready, nothing to hide. The system explicitly rejects the wholesale price-list aesthetic and flashy startup-landing gradients that read unserious to industrial buyers.
keyCharacteristics: Five HACCP zone colors used as information, never decoration
Deep Sanitary Blue surfaces alternating with white and washed-blue sections
Green reserved for action; every CTA is green
Mono uppercase micro-labels as the procedural voice
Flat surfaces, 1px hairlines, sharp 3px radius throughout

rules.name: The Zone Rule
rules.body: The five HACCP colors may appear only where zone meaning is real: legends, product-group chips, the zone bar, the logomark. Using a zone color as page decoration is prohibited — it corrupts the code the brand sells.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Green means "act". If an element is green, it is clickable or marks an action path. Never use green for passive decoration.

rules.name: The Marking Rule
rules.body: Anything small and systematic — kickers, form labels, button text, metadata — is set in IBM Plex Mono uppercase with wide tracking. This is the brand's one kicker system; it always carries its 22px green dash prefix in section heads.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: No element casts a shadow at rest. A shadow is always an answer to the cursor.

dos: Do reserve Action Green (#2f9e5c) for actions — every green element must be clickable or mark the conversion path.
Do use the five HACCP zone colors only where zone meaning is real: legends, chips, the zone bar, the key teeth.
Do keep all radii at exactly 3px and all resting borders at 1px — sharpness is the "engineered and precise" signature.
Do set every small systematic label in IBM Plex Mono uppercase with wide tracking.
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation.
Do keep body text at Ink (#16293c) or Steel Text (#55687c) on white, and white at ≥75% alpha on Sanitary Blue — WCAG AA (4.5:1) is the floor.
donts: Don't let this look like a wholesale price-list site: no cluttered product grids, no popups, no «Купить оптом!» banners.
Don't import flashy startup-landing aesthetics: no decorative gradients beyond the single hero blue-to-blue wash, no glassmorphism, no gradient text.
Don't use zone colors decoratively — a red divider or yellow highlight that isn't zone semantics breaks the system's credibility.
Don't add resting shadows or rounded (>3px) corners; softness reads as consumer, not industrial.
Don't use border-left/border-right color stripes on cards or callouts; the only permitted accent border is the 4px category top border on service cards.
Don't set Steel Text (#55687c) on tinted or dark backgrounds — use alpha-white on dark surfaces instead.
